task_title: Audit orphan test files (4 root-level duplicates)

findings.title: Exact duplicate of tests/test_gguf_path_wiring_final.py — 122 lines
findings.problem: This root-level file is an exact byte-for-byte duplicate of tests/test_gguf_path_wiring_final.py. It adds no value and clutters the repository root. pytest may discover and run both copies, doubling test execution time for these tests.
findings.fix: Delete the root-level duplicate. The canonical location is tests/test_gguf_path_wiring_final.py.
findings.evidence: diff returns zero output — files are identical
